title: More furnace crafts
body:
**New Furnace Crafts** is a simple mod that adds more logical recipes for the Furnace, Blast Furnace, and Smoker. It fills the gaps in vanilla Minecraft by allowing you to smelt items that previously couldn't be processed.

**Features:**

- Adds new smelting recipes for standard furnaces

- Expands the list of items for the Blast Furnace and Furnace

- Keeps the game balanced and vanilla-friendly

- Works perfectly in any modpack

**Why download this?** This mod is great for players who want more consistency in the game. Now you can recycle items and process resources more efficiently without changing the core gameplay.
